  1. gametree

Uses of Package
gametree

Packages that use gametree
Package
Description
algorithm
Search techniques based on B* and various utility classes used primarily by these search techniques.
experiment
Experiment classes which run individual experiments, as performed for the thesis, and the utility classes used by these experiments.
gametree
Various classes for storing and generating game trees for the use by algorithms and tree visualisation.
test
Various unit tests for maintaining basic functionality of several classes in other packages.
visualizer
Utilitiy classes specifically for visualising game trees using the command prompt or by generating figures with XML.
  • Classes in gametree used by algorithm
    Class
    Description
    GameTreeNode
    This class represents an abstract GameTreeNode which stores game positions of a game tree along with the structure of the tree itself through GameTreeNode.children(MetricKeeper...) and GameTreeNode.parent() relations.
    GameTreeNode.Result
    A record to hold the two best nodes (and their indices in the original collection).
    IGamePosition
    This interface represents a game position in any game which can be modelled as an adversarial or non-adversarial game.
    MetricKeeper
    This class is intended for use with algorithm testing by keeping track of metrics used to evaluate different algorithms on game tree search problems.
    SearchTreeNode
    Implementation of GameTreeNode that stores all nodes directly in memory.
    SearchTreeNode.Settings
    A class that stores the settings for a SearchTreeNode tree.
  • Classes in gametree used by experiment
    Class
    Description
    ArtificialGamePosition
    Represents a game position in an artificial game tree.
    Generator.Bounds
    The generator type specifically used for generating the bounds of the children generated as the children of each node of a VariantAGP artificial game tree.
    Generator.Width
    The generator type specifically used for generating the variable branching factor at each node of a VariantAGP artificial game tree.
    IGamePosition
    This interface represents a game position in any game which can be modelled as an adversarial or non-adversarial game.
    VariantAGP
    Represents a game position in a variant artificial game tree.
  • Classes in gametree used by gametree
    Class
    Description
    ArtificialGamePosition
    Represents a game position in an artificial game tree.
    ArtificialGamePosition.Settings
    A class that stores the settings for a ArtificialGamePosition tree.
    DepthFirstNode
    GameTreeNode implementation that does not store children nodes, but does store the depth of bounds and the bounds themselves.
    GameTreeNode
    This class represents an abstract GameTreeNode which stores game positions of a game tree along with the structure of the tree itself through GameTreeNode.children(MetricKeeper...) and GameTreeNode.parent() relations.
    GameTreeNode.Result
    A record to hold the two best nodes (and their indices in the original collection).
    Generator
    A generator for customising the tree structure of artificial game trees made with the VariantAGP class.
    Generator.Bounds
    The generator type specifically used for generating the bounds of the children generated as the children of each node of a VariantAGP artificial game tree.
    Generator.Width
    The generator type specifically used for generating the variable branching factor at each node of a VariantAGP artificial game tree.
    IGamePosition
    This interface represents a game position in any game which can be modelled as an adversarial or non-adversarial game.
    MetricKeeper
    This class is intended for use with algorithm testing by keeping track of metrics used to evaluate different algorithms on game tree search problems.
    ResultTreeNode
    Creates a tree of position type Q from a source tree with position type P with the help of a P-to-Q transformer.
    SearchTreeNode
    Implementation of GameTreeNode that stores all nodes directly in memory.
    SearchTreeNode.Settings
    A class that stores the settings for a SearchTreeNode tree.
    VariantAGP
    Represents a game position in a variant artificial game tree.
    VariantAGP.NodeInfo
    A record holding the information provided to Generator functions for determining the bounds of a generated child node.
    VariantAGP.Settings
    A class that stores the settings for a VariantAGP tree.
  • Classes in gametree used by test
    Class
    Description
    GameTreeNode
    This class represents an abstract GameTreeNode which stores game positions of a game tree along with the structure of the tree itself through GameTreeNode.children(MetricKeeper...) and GameTreeNode.parent() relations.
    IGamePosition
    This interface represents a game position in any game which can be modelled as an adversarial or non-adversarial game.
    MetricKeeper
    This class is intended for use with algorithm testing by keeping track of metrics used to evaluate different algorithms on game tree search problems.

    Class
    Description
    GameTreeNode
    This class represents an abstract GameTreeNode which stores game positions of a game tree along with the structure of the tree itself through GameTreeNode.children(MetricKeeper...) and GameTreeNode.parent() relations.
    MetricKeeper
    This class is intended for use with algorithm testing by keeping track of metrics used to evaluate different algorithms on game tree search problems.
